---
title: "Don Francisco Asís de Borbón, Duke of Cadiz"
---

## Don Francisco Asís de Borbón, Duke of Cadiz

**Dates:** (1822-1902)

**Maiden name:** de

### Description

King of Spain

### Biography

He married (1846) his double first cousin Queen Isabella II.

### Letters

- Letter from August 6. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
